prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II** turbocharger (hybrid billet wheel) with a **Tial MV-R 60mm** wastegate, paired with a **Czinger-specific 3D-printed Inconel 718 exhaust manifold** to optimize flow for the **2.88L flat-plane crank V8 (Czinger C2-88)** while maintaining the OEM dry-sump lubrication system. Target boost: 3.2 bar (46.4 psi) with **Motec M150 ECU** recalibration for 1,400+ hp on **E85 fuel** (stock block reinforced with **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs** and **Carrillo H-beam connecting rods**).

Installation of a **Pectel SQ6M+ standalone ECU** with **Czinger-specific traction control algorithms** (developed in collaboration with **Multimatic Motorsports**) to manage the **ZF 8HP95X 8-speed transaxle** under extreme lateral G-forces (up to 2.5G). Includes **Pankl Racing Systems carbon-fiber driveshafts** and a **Wavetrac Torsen-style limited-slip differential** with **Czinger 3D-printed titanium differential housing**.

Full **Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers** with **Czinger-specific spring rates (1,200 lb/in front, 1,500 lb/in rear)** and **Multimatic DSSV dampers** (adjustable via **Czinger’s proprietary telemetry system**). Chassis reinforcement via **3D-printed titanium subframe gussets** (developed with **AP Racing**) and **Brembo GT-RS 900 calipers** with **3D-printed titanium brake ducts** (designed in-house for the 21C’s airflow channels).
estetica: **Rocket Bunny x Czinger V Max Widebody Kit** (carbon-fiber with **Toray T800 prepreg**), featuring **active aerodynamic dive planes** (adjustable via **Czinger’s AI-driven aero mapping system**) and a **dual-element rear wing** with **Gurney flaps** (3D-printed from **Hexcel HexTow IM7 carbon fiber**).

**Forge Motorsport x Czinger titanium exhaust tips** (dual 120mm outlets with **Inconel 625 internal baffles**) and **3D-printed titanium side skirts** (integrated with **LED heat-extraction vents** for the hybrid system). Full **PPG ‘Liquid Metal’ paint finish** (custom-mixed for Czinger by **BASF**) with **Airlite ceramic coating** for thermal management.

**Czinger x Sparco Hyperflow seat system** (3D-printed carbon-fiber shells with **Alcantara ‘Czinger Blue’ inserts**) and **Schroth 6-point harnesses** (ASM-certified). **Motec C127 dash display** (integrated into the **Czinger 3D-printed titanium steering wheel**) with **real-time telemetry overlay** (developed with **Bosch Motorsport**).
